prompt: blue mushroom wizard with sleepy eyes and a tiny glowing staff
userPrompt: blue mushroom wizard with sleepy eyes and a tiny glowing staff
expandedPrompt: A whimsical blue mushroom wizard with oversized, sleepy eyes and a tiny glowing staff. The character has a rounded, mushroom-shaped head with a smooth, glossy texture. Its body is compact and connected, resembling a cute mascot with short limbs. The wizard wears a small, tattered robe that drapes around its body, adorned with tiny star patterns. The character has subtle gills along the sides of its head and a soft glow emanating from the tip of the staff, creating a magical ambiance. The overall silhouette is rounded and friendly, with a cheerful expression and a hint of drowsiness.

{
  "title": "Sleepy Blue Mushroom Wizard",
  "expandedPrompt": "A whimsical blue mushroom wizard with oversized, sleepy eyes and a tiny glowing staff. The character has a rounded, mushroom-shaped head with a smooth, glossy texture. Its body is compact and connected, resembling a cute mascot with short limbs. The wizard wears a small, tattered robe that drapes around its body, adorned with tiny star patterns. The character has subtle gills along the sides of its head and a soft glow emanating from the tip of the staff, creating a magical ambiance. The overall silhouette is rounded and friendly, with a cheerful expression and a hint of drowsiness.",
  "subject": "blue mushroom wizard with sleepy eyes and glowing staff",
  "mood": "whimsical",
  "palettePlan": { "primary": "blue", "secondary": "light blue", "accent": "glowing white" },
  "styleTags": ["cute mascot", "glossy SVG", "blue-avatar quality"],
  "visualChecklist": [
    "rounded mushroom-shaped head",
    "oversized sleepy eyes",
    "tiny glowing staff",
    "tattered robe with star patterns",
    "subtle gills on the head",
    "soft glow from the staff",
    "short limbs",
    "friendly expression"
  ],
  "requiredDetails": [
    "mushroom-shaped head",
    "glowing staff",
    "sleepy eyes",
    "tattered robe"
  ],
  "requiredRenderableDetails": [
    { "id": "head_shape", "label": "mushroom head", "acceptableShapes": ["mushroomHead"], "acceptableSockets": ["head.socket"], "minimumCount": 1 },
    { "id": "staff_shape", "label": "glowing staff", "acceptableShapes": ["staff"], "acceptableSockets": ["hand.socket"], "minimumCount": 1 },
    { "id": "eye_shape", "label": "sleepy eyes", "acceptableShapes": ["eye"], "acceptableSockets": ["face.socket"], "minimumCount": 2 },
    { "id": "robe_shape", "label": "tattered robe", "acceptableShapes": ["robe"], "acceptableSockets": ["body.socket"], "minimumCount": 1 }
  ],
  "forbiddenDetails": ["raw SVG", "HTML", "unvalidated custom shapes", "external images"],
  "qualityConstraints": ["oversized expressive head", "compact connected body", "readable silhouette", "valid renderer sockets only"]
}

rawReactCssCharacterContent:
{
  "componentName": "SleepyBlueMushroomWizard",
  "styleSystem": "my-dude-react-css-scaffold",
  "title": "Sleepy Blue Mushroom Wizard",
  "summary": "A whimsical blue mushroom wizard with oversized sleepy eyes and a tiny glowing staff.",
  "cssVariables": {
    "--dude-primary": "#38bdf8",
    "--dude-secondary": "#60a5fa",
    "--dude-accent": "#93c5fd",
    "--dude-eye": "#e0f2fe",
    "--dude-panel": "rgba(255,255,255,.18)",
    "--dude-mouth": "#0f172a",
    "--dude-body": "#1e3a8a",
    "--dude-arm": "#1e3a8a",
    "--dude-hand": "#facc15",
    "--dude-leg": "#1e3a8a",
    "--dude-foot": "#facc15"
  },
  "headShape": "mushroom",
  "bodyShape": "robe",
  "expression": "sleepy",
  "parts": [
    { "type": "mushroomCap", "color": "primary" },
    { "type": "mushroomGills", "color": "secondary" },
    { "type": "spot", "color": "accent" },
    { "type": "spot", "color": "accent" },
    { "type": "robe", "color": "body" },
    { "type": "magic-staff", "side": "right" }
  ],
  "notes": [
    "Character features a rounded mushroom-shaped head with gills.",
    "Includes oversized sleepy eyes and a tiny glowing staff.",
    "The robe is tattered with star patterns."
  ]
}
